pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 67-71 defines high_prob_leads with these exact names and probabilities: 90.0%, 85.0%, 75.0% respectively
setup_task.sh lines 74-78 defines low_prob_leads with these exact names and probabilities: 40.0%, 50.0%, 65.0% respectively

setup_task.sh uses >70% for high_prob_leads classification (90.0%, 85.0%, 75.0% all exceed 70%) and <=70% for low_prob_leads (40.0%, 50.0%, 65.0% all at or below 70%). Verifier.py does not explicitly state threshold but uses high_prob_names and low_prob_names arrays which align with 70% threshold.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic CRM data created specifically for this task scenario. Three high-probability opportunities (Global Logistics Contract at 90%, Enterprise License Upgrade at 85%, Q3 Managed Services at 75%) must be moved to a new 'Proposition (Final)' stage, while three low-probability opportunities (Office Expansion Inquiry at 40%, Initial Consultation at 50%, Hardware Refresh Estimate at 65%) must remain in the renamed 'Proposition (Draft)' stage. The probability threshold for classification is 70%.
